title: Awaiting Sign-off Workflow
summary: Added a new Awaiting Sign-off section to prevent features with unchecked manual contracts from landing in Done, fixed the workflow timing, and synced everything to the DOE starter kit.

breakdowns.heading: Awaiting Sign-off system
bullets: New ## Awaiting Sign-off section in todo.md as intermediate state between code-complete and verified
Audit check warns if unchecked manual contracts found in Done
Features move to Awaiting Sign-off immediately when last auto passes

breakdowns.heading: Reporting integration
bullets: SIGN-OFF row added to stand-up and sitrep cards
Collapsible grouped cards in wrap HTML with themed item groups
Booking Flow (12 items) and Search & Discovery (19 items) moved to new section

breakdowns.heading: DOE kit sync + cleanup
bullets: Synced Awaiting Sign-off workflow to kit as v1.30.0
Fixed timing circular dependency, patched as v1.30.1
Removed Session Activity heatmap from HQ dashboard

commitLog.message: Add Awaiting Sign-off section to prevent unchecked manual contracts in Done
Add Awaiting Sign-off section to wrap HTML, stand-up, and sitrep
Collapsible grouped layout for Awaiting Sign-off in wrap HTML
Update DOE Starter Kit version to v1.30.0 in STATE.md
Remove Session Activity heatmap from HQ dashboard
Fix Awaiting Sign-off timing: move immediately when last auto passes
Update DOE Starter Kit version to v1.30.1 in STATE.md

todaySessions.summary: Scoped and built all 6 steps of Booking Flow: UI primitives, modal, date picker, price summary, confirmation.
DOE health check on Windows. Installed Node.js and Python, fixed git hooks for Windows compatibility.
Built DOE renderer enhancements: badges, dark/light toggle, EOD bar fix, HQ heatmap, side-by-side stats. Synced to kit v1.29.0.
Added Awaiting Sign-off workflow, fixed timing, removed HQ heatmap, synced to DOE kit v1.30.0 + v1.30.1.

timeline.desc: Awaiting Sign-off section: CLAUDE.md, todo.md, audit check
Reporting: wrap HTML, stand-up, sitrep integration
Collapsible grouped cards in wrap HTML

decisions.title: Awaiting Sign-off as intermediate state
decisions.problem: Features with unchecked manual contracts were landing in Done, bypassing human verification
decisions.solution: Added ## Awaiting Sign-off section between Queue and Done. Features go there by default at completion. Only move to Done when all manual items are checked.

decisions.title: Immediate move on last auto pass
decisions.problem: Original design had features moving to Awaiting Sign-off at retro/wrap time, creating a circular dependency
decisions.solution: Changed to move immediately when last step auto criteria pass, in the same commit. No ceremony needed.

learnings.title: Workflow timing matters
learnings.problem: The retro step that routes features to Awaiting Sign-off vs Done was described as part of session wrap, but manual checks need to be presented before wrap
learnings.solution: Made the move happen immediately at feature completion (last auto pass), not at any later ceremony. The retro runs inline with the last step.

awaitingSignOff.summary: Multi-step booking modal: space selection, date/time picker, guest count, price summary, instant vs manual booking paths

groups.name: Modal & Navigation
items: Clicking Book a Space opens modal with space selection grid
Clicking per-space Book this space opens modal at date step
Modal becomes full-screen on mobile
Back button navigates between steps correctly
Escape key closes modal

groups.name: Date & Time Selection
items: Calendar renders with today highlighted, past dates greyed
Duration options only show tiers the space supports
Hourly selection shows available time slots

groups.name: Pricing & Confirmation
items: Price breakdown shows correct calculation for each duration type
Guest count capped at space capacity
Instant booking shows confirmation, manual shows pending message

groups.name: End-to-End
items: Full flow works: select space, pick date, set guests, confirm

awaitingSignOff.summary: Split-view search page with list/map, filters with URL sync, property cards, responsive layout

groups.name: Property Cards
items: Card renders with thumbnail, name, city, rating, badges, and price
Hover state shows subtle visual feedback

groups.name: Filters & URL Sync
items: Selecting filters updates the URL bar in real time
Pasting a URL with filter params pre-selects the correct filters
Clear all resets filters and URL
On mobile, filters appear in a slide-up drawer

groups.name: Map Integration
items: Map or fallback renders with pins at correct relative positions
Pin shows price and uses brand colors

groups.name: Split View & Interaction
items: Split view shows list on left, map on right on desktop
Hovering a card highlights the corresponding map pin
Clicking a map pin scrolls to and highlights the corresponding card
Filters reduce visible results in both list and map
On mobile, List/Map toggle switches between full-width views
Empty state shows when no properties match filters

groups.name: Responsive & SSR
items: View page source shows property names and prices in HTML
Mobile layout is usable at 375px width
Tablet layout shows a sensible split or toggle
Empty state appears when all filters are set to impossible values
Tab key navigates through filter controls in logical order

nextUp: Scope Employer Dashboard [APP] from ROADMAP and test Booking Flow + Search & Discovery manual items
